audit_result.proof_trace: Property claims all Engine API calls are JWT-authenticated, but IPC transport bypasses JWT entirely. The AuthLayer middleware is only applied to HTTP server (L93) via set_http_middleware(). IPC server is built and started (L109-110) without any authentication layer, accepting any local process that can access the Unix socket.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Local attacker (malicious process, compromised container, local user) connects to Engine API IPC socket and sends newPayload/forkchoiceUpdated without JWT token, bypassing authentication. EL data is still verified post-execution, but unauthenticated access violates the JWT authentication requirement.

PROP-ff7df16a-asm-002.text: Engine API communication is JWT-authenticated; EL data is semi-trusted but must be verified.
